governanceNotes: This checklist does not automatically edit the live FYEC100 knowledge base.
Use it to document the manual process for applying approved draft wording.
After the live Markdown file is edited, run the smoke test and update knowledge base release notes.

steps.label: Pre-apply review
steps.evidence: Review linked draft updates and change requests before live content edits.

steps.label: Content-owner approval
steps.evidence: Confirm wording is approved for FYEC100 controlled pilot use.

steps.label: Manual Markdown edit
steps.evidence: Apply approved wording manually to data/fyec100-knowledge-base.md.

steps.label: Guardrail review
steps.evidence: Confirm updated wording does not weaken academic integrity, grading, or assignment-writing boundaries.

steps.label: Smoke test
steps.evidence: Run npm run smoke:pilot after the manual knowledge base edit.

steps.label: Release note update
steps.evidence: Record applied change in data/kb-release-notes.json with related draft and change request IDs.
